stated_root_cause: service-control is returning 503 errors due to Spanner connectivity failure or resource exhaustion, causing cascading failures across all dependent APIs (api-gateway, workspace, compute-api) that rely on its auth/quota check.

service-control control plane is crash-looping due to a bad/blank quota-policy config (NullPointer exception), causing it to return 503 errors on auth/quota checks, which cascades failures across all dependent APIs (api-gateway, workspace, compute-api).

service-control is experiencing a cascading failure (likely resource exhaustion or crash post-deploy) causing 503 responses on auth/quota checks, which propagates upstream to api-gateway and downstream to all dependent services (workspace, compute-api, bigquery-api).

service-control control plane is crash-looping due to a bad/blank quota-policy config (NullPointer), causing upstream auth/quota check failures that cascade 503 errors across all dependent product APIs (api-gateway, workspace, compute-api).
service-control is returning 503 errors due to degraded Spanner connectivity or resource exhaustion following the api-gateway deploy, causing cascading failures across all dependent services.

service-control control plane is crash-looping due to a bad/blank quota-policy config (NullPointer exception), causing it to return 503 errors on auth/quota checks, which cascades upstream failures across api-gateway and all dependent services (workspace, compute-api).
